label: E-Commerce, Support & Logistics Pak
blurb: E-Commerce, Support & Logistics. Customer retention and operational efficiency.

skills.label: Support Ticket Categorizer
skills.method: NLP analysis of incoming Zendesk tickets, routes to Tier 1, 2, or Billing.

skills.label: Angry Customer De Escalator
skills.method: Detects profanity/caps lock, drafts an empathetic, policy-compliant apology for human review.

skills.label: Abandoned Cart Deal Maker
skills.method: Emails cart-abandoners with a dynamically generated, expiring discount code.
trigger_examples: recovers 5-10% of lost gross merchandise value

skills.label: Product Description Optimizer
skills.method: Rewrites generic manufacturer SKU descriptions into brand-voice, SEO-rich copy.

skills.label: Return Rma Processor
skills.method: Validates order window, checks return policy, generates Shopify refund and shipping label.
trigger_examples: fully automates the most hated e-comm task

skills.label: Fraudulent Order Flag
skills.method: Cross-references IP address distance from billing zip code and cart size anomalies.

skills.label: Inventory Reorder Predictor
skills.method: Analyzes current stock, lead time, and seasonal sales velocity to trigger POs.

skills.label: Review Sentiment Aggregator
skills.method: Scrapes Amazon reviews, clusters complaints (e.g., "zipper breaks"), sends report to product team.

skills.label: Supplier Delay Negotiator
skills.method: Reads factory emails, detects delays, auto-emails downstream wholesale buyers to warn them.
